title: gardenia rolfei
intro: Gardenia rolfei, also known as the Roxburgh's gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gardenia rolfei include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Gardenia rolfei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
